user.title: Connect to NeoVolt (AlphaESS) System
user.description: Enter the connection details for your AlphaESS inverter.

data_description.host: The IP address of your AlphaESS inverter on your local network.
data_description.slave_id: The Modbus slave ID of your inverter (default: 85).
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the inverter for new data, in seconds (5-300, default: 10).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the inverter. Check IP address and port.
